message:
🐛 Fix dismiss button not actually dismissing card recommendations (#4227) (#4231)

The handleDismiss function only closed the dropdown without calling
dismissRecommendation(), so dismissed recommendations immediately
reappeared. Updated the handler to accept the recommendation object
and call dismissRecommendation(rec.id), matching the pattern used
by handleSnooze and handleAddCard.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
